"Every dish that leaves our kitchen is made to order — fresh dough, fresh filling, fresh fire. No shortcuts, ever."

Our Story

From Cloud to Street

Started in 2024 as a cloud kitchen, Box & Bowl has quickly grown into one of Nawada's most loved food spots — and now proudly serves from our very own offline outlet at Happy Chowk, Gurudwara Road.

What began as a passion for making the perfect momo has blossomed into a full menu — from hand-folded steamed & fried momos to crispy chicken wings, hearty curries, and our brand-new Momo Burger. People come for the food, they stay for the taste.

We use zero frozen ingredients — every batch is freshly prepared the day it's served. Our kitchen is hygiene-certified, and every order is made with the same care as if it's for family.
